artifact: Report: DirectLLM did not execute data. The SQL flags 1997 months where card-withdrawal amount is at least 1.30 times the 1997 monthly average, then attributes flagged volume by district and card type. The unusual months are the flagged_month rows; the largest SUM(amount) contributors indicate the dominant districts and card types.
sql: WITH monthly AS (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', CAST(t.date AS DATE)) AS month, SUM(t.amount) AS month_amount FROM trans AS t WHERE t.operation = 'VYBER KARTOU' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(t.date AS DATE)) = 1997 GROUP BY 1), flagged AS (SELECT month, month_amount, AVG(month_amount) OVER () AS avg_1997_month_amount FROM monthly WHERE month_amount >= 1.30 * (SELECT AVG(month_amount) FROM monthly)) SELECT f.month AS flagged_month, d.A2 AS district, c.type AS card_type, SUM(t.amount) AS attributed_amount FROM flagged AS f JOIN trans AS t ON DATE_TRUNC('month', CAST(t.date AS DATE)) = f.month JOIN account AS a ON t.account_id = a.account_id JOIN district AS d ON a.district_id = d.district_id LEFT JOIN disp AS disp ON a.account_id = disp.account_id LEFT JOIN card AS c ON disp.disp_id = c.disp_id WHERE t.operation = 'VYBER KARTOU' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(t.date AS DATE)) = 1997 GROUP BY 1, 2, 3 ORDER BY 1, 4 DESC;
